briefs.title: BC Consumer Protection Rules Tighten: Low-Value Claim Threshold and Future Performance Contract Definitions Set
briefs.summary: Effective August 1, 2026, BC sets a $5,000 threshold for 'low value claims' (barring dispute-resolution clauses) and a $50 cumulative threshold triggering 'future performance contract' rules under the Business Practices and Consumer Protection Act.
briefs.action_required: Review your consumer contracts and dispute-resolution clauses to ensure compliance with the new thresholds by August 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Consumer Protection Amendment Act 2025 — new contract rules take effect
